content:
Take That - Back For Good

Tabbed by: Carl-Johan Holtback, member of The Shrimps
[marabou_man14@hotmail.com]


[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dsus[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  x2


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
I guess, now it's time, for me to give up, I feel it's time[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Got a picture of you beside me, got your lipstick marks still on your[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
coffee cup[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
oh yeah[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Got a fist of your emotion, got a head of shattered   dreams[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Gotta leave it, gotta leave it all behind now[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Whatever I said, whatever I did, I didn't mean it[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
I just want you back for good, (want you back, want you back, want you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
back for good)[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
You'll be right and understood, (want you back, want you back) I want[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
you back for good[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]

But that was not to be[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
